name: Pasta Sauce with Lemon & Garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat and add garlic until tender.
2. Remove from heat and pour in the white wine. Return to the heat.
3. Cook for another 1 to 2 minutes, until the wine has reduced by half.
4. Stir in lemon juice, tomatoes, basil, Parmesan cheese, and black pepper.
5. Serve over cooked pasta.
